transcript: Hey, I was lookin' for Paul.
Yeah, this is Barney. Callin' about some equipment, here. I think you... might have picked some up and taken off.
Well, I got your number from Luigi up at UEG there. I got a nonagonical harness, I got a hydraulic buttress, I got a bunch of rotors... none of them are there anymore.
Nah, dude. You got the wrong number.
You're Paul. I need to get 'em back, that's the long and short of it.
Buddy, I'm a producer. I don't know what you're talking about.
These are from on set. You're not familiar with the technical stuff, I get it. You picked it up and didn't know what you were doing. I just want 'em back.
What do you mean I picked it up? I don't pick up anything, buddy! I'm a producer! I don't pick up... equipment!
It's from my camera operator and myself, okay? I got a buttress and a harness, and I just wanna get 'em from ya today! Alright?
I don't have any of your equipment, buddy. I don't have any camera equipment! Uh, I don't know how you got my number but... I don't know who you are, but... you got the wrong dude, bro.
You want me to file you a grievance with my union stuart or...what do ya what me to do here?
Uh, do whatever you gotta do bro, what job was I on with you that you think you know me?
Hey, I've got 9 and a half years on the business, my friend.
Seriously, man. I'm not in the union. You can file whatever you want.
Yeah, I don't know who that is.
I'm gonna talk to my union studat if you don't give me what I neeeed
Bro, go ahead. I don't know who Barney Blah-Ha is. I've never hired you on a job, I don't know who you are...
Listen get with me today and let's get 'er taken care of, you got it?
Hey listen, Paul I'm not messin' around here [voice glitches]
So what job was I on?
